content: agent1: working on fixing resource leak in shell completion - wrapping context creation in _resolve_context (shell_completion.py) with 'with' statements so contexts are properly closed. Also may touch src/click/core.py if Context needs __exit__ support. Will ping before finalizing.

agent1: my fix is done - only touched src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context function, wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in 'with' blocks so contexts+file handles close properly) and added a CHANGES.rst entry. Did NOT touch core.py at all - Context.__enter__/__exit__/close already worked correctly for this, no core.py changes needed on my end. If your validate_nesting work also touches _resolve_context or Context.__enter__/__exit__ in core.py, let's compare before merging so we don't clobber each other. What's your target API/behavior for validate_nesting?
